activity: RUNNER CHECK-IN at Heavenly Stagecoach Lodge
notes: 1:00–3:30 PM check-in, medical, GPS, gear check, mugshot. Drop-bag deadline 5:00 PM. Mandatory meeting 4:00–5:00 PM.
Drop remaining bags 6:00–8:30 AM. SPOT pickup + check-in 7:00–8:45 AM.
Target Barker Pass sleep stop. Pacer pickup at Loon Lake.
Target finish at Heavenly Monday afternoon or evening. Crew at finish. Buckle photo.
105-hour race cutoff 6:00 PM if still on course. Plan is to be done Monday.
